front.title: Registration Data Access Protocol (RDAP) Extension for Server Validation

abstract.t: This document describes an Registration Data Access Protocol (RDAP) extension for providing the status of server validations. Server validations can be done for an extensible set of types, with examples including validating DNS resolution with the type "dns" and validating DNSSEC with the type "dnssec". The validations can be performed synchronously in the provisioning command or asynchronously based on a triggering command or a schedule. The extension will provide the status of the validations, by type, performed by the server in an RDAP lookup response.
